title: cistus libanotis var. sedjera
intro: Cistus libanotis var. sedjera, also known as rockrose, is a plant species belonging to the Cistus genus, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of rockrose include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Rockrose can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in skincare products due to its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties.
